Correct answer: C
Solution

(c)

Technical • MECHANICAL ENGINEERING • +1 / -0.33
Not attempted

Correct answer: C
Solution

(c)

Correct answer: B
Solution

(b)

Correct answer: A
Solution

(a)

Not attempted

Correct answer: A
Solution

(a)

Q10 Not checked
Technical • MECHANICAL ENGINEERING • +1 / -0
Not attempted

A spherical ball of mass 15 kg is welded to a vertical light rod which in turn is welded at B to a horizontal rod as shown below. Two springs of stiffness k1 = 8.8 N/mm and k2 = 9.9 N/mm are connected to the horizontal rod. For a small angular displacement at B, the natural frequency of system is_____ rad/s.

(Correct upto two decimal places)

NAT
Correct answer: 10.12 (10.00 - 10.24)
Solution

10.12 (10.00 - 10.24)

Q11 Not checked
Technical • MECHANICAL ENGINEERING • +1 / -0
Not attempted

A cam is designed for roller follower with cycloidal cam profile during outstroke and return stroke. Outstroke has maximum lift of 31.4 mm and maximum acceleration of 7102 mm/s2. If cam is rotating at uniform speed of 120 rev/min, then the angle turned by the cam at maximum acceleration position with respect to the location where cam profile starts is _____ degrees. (Answer in integer)

NAT
Correct answer: 120 (119 - 121)
Solution

120 (119 - 121)

Q12 Not checked
Technical • MECHANICAL ENGINEERING • +1 / -0
Not attempted

A flat-faced follower is driven using a circular eccentric cam rotating at a constant angular speed of 20 rad/s. If the eccentricity of the cam is 20 mm, then the magnitude of maximum acceleration of the follower is____mm/s2. (Answer in integer)

NAT
Correct answer: 8000 (8000 - 8000)
Solution

8000 (8000 - 8000)

Q13 Not checked
Technical • MECHANICAL ENGINEERING • +1 / -0
Not attempted

The flywheel of a steam engine has a radius of gyration of 1 m and mass 2500 kg. The starting torque of the steam engine is 1500 Nm and may be assumed constant. The angular acceleration of the flywheel is _______ rad/s2.

NAT
Correct answer: 0.6 (0.5 - 0.7)
Solution

0.6 (0.5 - 0.7)

Q14 Not checked
Technical • MECHANICAL ENGINEERING • +1 / -0
Not attempted

A punching machine carries out 6 holes per minute. Each hole requires 42 kJ of energy. The thickness of plate which is required to be punched is 40 mm and the punch has a stroke of 100 mm. If the total fluctuation of speed is limited to 5% of mean speed. The energy given by the flywheel during each punching will be_____ kJ.

(Correct upto one decimal place)

NAT
Correct answer: 33.6 (33 - 34)
Solution

33.6 (33 - 34)

Solution

Correct answer: A
Solution

(a)

NAT
Correct answer: 0.34 (0.30 - 0.38)
Solution

0.34 (0.30 - 0.38)

Correct answer: B
Solution

(b)

Not attempted

Consider the turning moment diagram for a multi-cylinder engine which is running at 800 rev/min against a constant load torque. (Correct upto two decimal places)

NAT
Correct answer: 0.28 (0.20 - 0.40)
Solution

0.28 (0.20 - 0.40)
